name: ica-weekly-report-application
description: ICA Usage Analytics — install, build, and run scripts for the full application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.cf:build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.cf:start: npm run cf:build && npm install --prefix backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node backend/server.js
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && mkdir -p data
